title: Minimalist E-commerce Store
description: A clean, modern e-commerce storefront with a focus on high-quality product imagery, smooth filtering, and an intuitive checkout process.
promptText: Design a minimalist e-commerce storefront for a high-end fashion brand. The homepage should feature a full-screen hero image with a simple sans-serif typography overlay. Below the hero section, include a clean product grid with hover effects showing alternative angles of the products. Add a functional sidebar filter for categories, sizes, and colors. The color palette should be essentially monochromatic (black, white, shades of gray) to let the product photography stand out. Ensure the cart and checkout process feels seamless and premium.

title: Futuristic SaaS Dashboard
description: A sleek, dark-themed analytics dashboard with glassmorphic cards, real-time chart widgets, and a purple-to-cyan accent gradient.
promptText: Design a futuristic SaaS analytics dashboard with a dark navy background (#0a0f1e). Include glassmorphic cards with frosted glass effect showing KPI metrics (revenue, users, growth rate). Add an area chart with purple-to-cyan gradient fill, a sidebar navigation with glowing active states, and a top bar with search and avatar. Use Inter font, rounded corners, and subtle glow effects on hover. Make it look premium and modern.

title: AI Startup Landing Page
description: A bold, conversion-focused landing page for an AI startup with animated hero section, feature grid, and social proof section.
promptText: Create a landing page for an AI-powered writing assistant startup. Hero section with large bold headline "Write 10x Faster with AI", a glowing CTA button, and an animated illustration of AI generating text. Below, add a 3-column feature grid with icons (speed, accuracy, creativity). Include a testimonial carousel with avatar, name, and quote. Use a dark background with vibrant purple accents, smooth scroll animations, and modern typography.

title: Mobile Banking App UI
description: Clean, modern mobile banking app with card management, transaction history, and budget tracking features.
promptText: Design a mobile banking app UI with a dark theme. Home screen showing: virtual card at the top with a holographic gradient effect, quick action buttons (Send, Receive, Pay, Top-up), recent transactions list with merchant icons, and a spending breakdown donut chart. Use rounded UI elements, the color palette of deep black (#0d0d0d) with electric blue (#00d4ff) accents.

title: Minimal Portfolio Website
description: An ultra-clean, minimalist portfolio for designers with smooth page transitions and a focus on showcasing work.
promptText: Design a minimalist portfolio website for a UI/UX designer. Use a clean white/off-white background with black typography. Hero section with just a name, title, and a single line bio. Below, show a 2-column masonry grid of project thumbnails that expand on hover with a subtle zoom and overlay showing project name. Navigation should be minimal — just Work, About, Contact. Use lots of whitespace and smooth transitions.
